author: Krabalot
msg: I think his point is that no new information is actually being provided compared to that 3 months ago. Posts on X have been more for marketing than to actually inform UNOs of developments that they have been requesting details for. Volume growing... We've been told that for months... Clients are onboarding ... We've been told that for months also ... Same with the telemetry platform announcement, which was hinted at many times in response to people complaining about telemetry task revenue and stability issues. I suppose we'll get answers to all the important questions at the AMA on Monday, but I understand how a lot of actions are leaving a bad taste and compounding doubt and suspicion for some people who have been following the progress of Unity since pre-sale.

author: ✌🏽🥸Shazza YNWA
msg:
Guys,

I’m stepping away for a while. I can’t keep dealing with constant delays and new task releases that are hyped and then don’t work properly amongst many of the other disappointments we’ve endured so far, Hopefully UNOs keep pushing the team for accountability, but I’m super drained out, another ama postponed which was the last straw for me.👎🏽

I hope the project delivers something with tangible consistent daily rewards in the next 12/15 months for the community, good luck. 

I’ll check in from time to time and will engage again if I see tasks worth the wile with rewards hitting 1UPs or more, sick of seeing cents and less over the pass 2/3 weeks.

FYI …I have 17 Vivo phones open to all networks for sale, based in London, all 5 months old. Message me if interested.

author: Dodo | MRCY Nodes | UNITY - MN - WM - CHIRP
msg:
To get the update to the latest build please force close the app and open it again and check your build number. It should be 

2aa32d7

If it isnt, please keep force closing the app and reopening it till the app updates. Might take 2 or 3 tries.

To check the build number please click on the 3 dots on the bottem right and then go to settings and scroll all the way down.

author: Dodo | MRCY Nodes | UNITY - MN - WM - CHIRP
msg:
Maybe I phrased it not in the best way, was in a rush. What I meant was that there is a fix, at least for most people. All of my ULOs who previously couldnt verify their numbers could do so afte they updated to the latest build. I had one who couldnt and later it turned out that he hadnt updated and only checked for the version number and not the build number. 

There might be people that still have issues, yes, but there was a fix that solved it for MOST people. Sorry that you and your ULOs apparently fall into the other category 🙏

author: Flippy
msg:
Right now the sentiment is rock bottom. 
No one is interested in Unity Nodes, while the deal is at its best.
ULOs abandon their licenses daily.
UNOs want to get out.

When we started at least there was some hype and promises that werent shattered yet.
Nodes were being sold. Rewards were higher / less restrictions.

We are definitely 10 steps back compared to when we started.

author: ⚡️BeyondLimitsNodes⚡️
msg:
Unity Verified - quick update for node holders:

A naming issue is currently affecting how the Unity Network app appears in some Google Play Stores.

We’re actively investigating and working with the relevant parties to resolve this as quickly as possible. A potential rename may be required.

What this means for you:

The network continues to run as normal
Your node activity and participation are unaffected
No impact to your data or progress
The APK remains fully available and unaffected

This is a surface-level issue only, and it’s being handled.

We’ll keep this group updated first as things progress - appreciate your continued support.
